info.english_meaning: to churn to think to meditate to ponder

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'sannipAtAvaDUtESca pramATonmaTanEstaTA' (hari॰2.30.32) pramATo (mallasTa) BUmO pAtanam BArate (virAwa॰13.27) apyayaM SlokaH paWyate
tatra nIlakaRWa eva vivfRoti- nipAtya pezaRaM BUmO pramATa iti kaTyate yattUtTAyANgamaTanaM tadunmaTanamucyate
'prayojayati conmATaM nityamastaM gate ravO' (BA0 SAM0 13823) unmATaH kUwayantraM paSumfgapakzibanDanam
